name: app_icon
description: A mobile app icon, FULL-BLEED square with no rounded corners (the OS masks it): a big radiant gold star with a subtle smiling sparkle sitting on a rich teal-to-deep-teal gradient background, one ribbon accent at the bottom, edge-to-edge color.
prompt_extra: full-bleed opaque square, subject fills ~70% of the canvas, readable at 60px
